title: Aleuritia moschophora
taxonomy: Aleuritia moschophora is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia, specifically in the tropical regions of Indonesia, Malaysia, and the Philippines. The classification of Aleuritia moschophora is as a species of flowering plant, belonging to the genus Aleuritia within the family Rubiaceae. This genus is part of the order Gentianales, which comprises several families of flowering plants. Further classification places Aleuritia moschophora within the class Magnoliopsida, also known as flowering plants or angiosperms.
